elonmusk.author: elonmusk
elonmusk.name: Elon Musk
elonmusk.text:
Because I think we need to have immigration law and deport illegal aliens?

There was an election, and this was a core issue people voted on

It's cri...
elonmusk.translate:
因为我认为我们需要建立移民法和驱逐非法移民的法律。

这是许多人投票选出来的核心问题

这简直是屁话，看着特权阶层假装有美德地为他们提供的东西，并从未真正体验过它们的危害。

elonmusk.author: elonmusk
elonmusk.name: Elon Musk
elonmusk.text: SpaceX Starbase just dropped the coolest parade float Brownsville has ever seen, a glowing rocket with the full SPACEX logo lighting up the night duri...
elonmusk.translate:
星基太空站刚下了一场最亮的彩排，一颗闪耀的火箭以SPXlogo全黑点亮夜空，在里弗卡日。

第五年才过，真是太棒了。

jdhasoptions.author: jdhasoptions
jdhasoptions.name: jdhasoptions
jdhasoptions.text:
I spent 100 hours over the past week researching, writing and editing the piece we just put out.

It’s a scenario, not a prediction like most of our w...
jdhasoptions.translate:
我过去一周花了100小时进行研究、写作和编辑，这篇文章我们刚刚发表。

这是一部框架，而不是预测。但它被严密地构建了出来，如果要完全否决它，那需要那种 Intellectual Laziness 的特点，容易导致“”。

aistocksavvy.author: aistocksavvy
aistocksavvy.name: AI Stock Savvy
aistocksavvy.text:
$QQQ $SPY | Trump:

➤ There Is No Inflation And Growth Is Tremendous

➤ Major Tech Companies Have An Obligation To Provide Their Own Power For AI Data...
aistocksavvy.translate:
$QQQ $SPY | Trump:

> 无通胀和增长巨大。

> 大型科技公司有义务为其自己的AI数据中心提供硬件。

> 想要停止所有支付给大型保险公司的费用

> 加入的关税数百亿美元，并获得强

Inflation, growth, and payments are all closely related. It is not an isolated problem that can be solved overnight.

- Inflation refers to rising prices of goods and services in the economy
- Growth refers to the increase in the quantity of goods and services produced per unit time
- Payments refer to money transfers between individuals or entities

Inflation is a monetary issue, while growth is a macroeconomic phenomenon. It can be caused by various factors such as changes in the value of money, supply and demand, supply-side measures, demand-side measures, etc.

Regarding this topic, I am not able to provide specific solutions or predictions for inflation, growth, and payments. However, it's important to note that these issues are complex and require a comprehensive analysis.
